original_image_tags: A black-and-white photograph of a dark-colored envelope. The address is handwritten in large, white or light-colored capital letters. In the upper right corner, there is a United States postage stamp and a circular postmark. A handwritten annotation is visible in the upper left corner.

elements.description: A black and white photograph of a dark-colored envelope. The envelope is addressed in white handwritten text to 'THE CINCINNATI ENQUIRER'. A circular postmark reads 'CINCINNATI, OHIO / JUL 3 / 930PM / 1952'. A 3-cent United States postage stamp depicting Thomas Edison is affixed at the top right, partially canceled by wavy lines. A faint, diagonal handwritten annotation is visible in the upper left corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content—a black-and-white photograph of a dark envelope with handwritten addressing, a postmark, a stamp, and an upper-left annotation—while Description B adds specific quoted text (e.g., 'CINCINNATI ENQUIRER', the postmark date and time, the stamp subject) that Description A omits but does not contradict.
